channel.title: Home on Tirui (Steve) Cao - Personal Website
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Tirui (Steve) Cao - Personal Website

item.title: Introduction to Routeia
item.description: Routeia (/ˈraʊtiə/) is my small, evolving research initiative for applying optimization and analytics to interesting decision problems, starting with transportation science and logistics (TSL) and extending beyond it. Through Routeia, I aim to pursue practice-driven, openly shared research that can inspire both researchers and practitioners. To start, I plan to publish technical notes and blog posts on my personal website.

item.title: Miscellaneous
item.description:
More about Me

  1. I am a huge foodie, especially when it comes to Japanese cuisine and sushi 🍣.

    • According to my photo archive, I had more than 550 pieces of sushi in 2024 alone.
    • I hosted three Japanese culinary events in Beijing and curated the menus for each of them.
    • I interviewed a female kaiseki chef—which is still quite rare in this field—and wrote an article published by a media outlet.
    • Like many food lovers, I once thought my passion for food would naturally lead to cooking. After quite a number of failed attempts, however, I have had to admit that I am sadly not a good cook 😞.

  2. I am also a wine and spirits enthusiast, with a particular fondness for Japanese sake, Champagne, and cocktails. I am always on the lookout for memorable bottles, hidden gems, and beautifully crafted drinks. One of my favorite bottles is Dom Ruinart Rosé 1996.

item.title: Awards
item.description:
Grants

  • 2025: TSL Cross-Regional Doctoral Grant, INFORMS TSL Society
    • Three PhD students worldwide
  • 2024: THU Doctoral Grant, Tsinghua University

Scholarships

  • 2022: Excellent Teaching Assistant Award, Tsinghua University
    • Four PhD students in Department of IE
  • 2020–2025: Future Scholar Scholarship, Tsinghua University
    • Four PhD students in Department of IE
  • 2020: Excellent Graduate Award, Tsinghua University
  • 2018: National Scholarship, Tsinghua University

item.title: Presentations
item.description:
1. Urban Delivery with Hierarchical Warehouses

    • 2022 IEEE International Conference on Automation Science and Engineering (CASE)
      Aug 20222, Chengdu, China
      [The Second Prize Oral Presentation Winner @ Student Event]
    • 2023 INFORMS Transportation and Logistics (TLS) Society Conference
      Jul 2023, Chicago IL, USA
    • 2024 Joint Event Sino-European Programme
      May 2024, Hangzhou, China
    • 2024 INFORMS Annual Meeting
      Oct 2024, Seattle WA, USA
    • 2024 THU Diversity Day Event
      Dec 2024, Beijing, China

  2. E-fulfillment Strategies under Stochastic Orders and Cancellations

item.title: Research
item.description:
Working Papers

Author order is alphabetical.

  1. Urban Delivery with Hierarchical Warehouses
    with Xue Luo, Hengle Qin, Yilei Wan, Chen Wang, Lei Zhao

  2. Intra-City Express Delivery Service Network Design
    with Yixiao Huang, Alexandre Jacquillat, Alexandria Schmid, Lei Zhao

  3. Formulations for the Scheduled Service Network Design Problem: A Theoretical and Computational Comparison

item.title: Teaching
item.description:
Tsinghua University

  1. Introduction to Decision Making (Graduate)

    • Fall 2020: Teaching Assistant (Instructor: Lei Zhao)
    • Fall 2021: Teaching Assistant (Instructor: Lei Zhao)
    • Fall 2022: Teaching Assistant (Instructor: Lei Zhao)

  2. Operations Research I: Deterministic Models (Undergraduate)

    • Fall 2024: Teaching Assistant (Instructor: Lei Zhao)
    • Fall 2025: Teaching Assistant (Instructor: Lei Zhao)

  3. Operations Research III: Decision Making (Undergraduate)

    • Spring 2020: Teaching Assistant (Instructor: Lei Zhao)
    • Spring 2021: Teaching Assistant (Instructor: Lei Zhao)
    • Spring 2022: Teaching Assistant (Instructor: Lei Zhao)
    • Spring 2023: Teaching Assistant (Instructor: Lei Zhao)
    • Spring 2024: Teaching Assistant (Instructor: Lei Zhao)

  4. Decision Analytics (Undergraduate)
